title: Incertidumbre comercial modera inversiones de nearshoring; proyectos siguen: Covalto
summary: El director general de Banco Covalto, Mark McCoy, señaló que la incertidumbre comercial con Estados Unidos ha moderado —sin detener— las inversiones de nearshoring en México, con mayor impacto en el sector automotriz. El banco digital, con cerca de 15% de su cartera en pymes exportadoras, describe el fenómeno como un aplazamiento de decisiones más que un retiro de capital.

title: House off the Ground / nanometer architecture
summary: This house by nanometer architecture lifts five meters from the front road toward the rear of its sloped site, resolving a brief that combined fixed room dimensions with a no-garden request against local green-space requirements. The design works through these contradictions rather than resolving them into a conventional layout.

title: Bankaool nombra como CEO a exdirectivo de Actinver y Sabadell
summary: Bankaool nombró a Francisco Lira Mariel, con más de 20 años de trayectoria en HSBC, Santander, Banco Sabadell México y Actinver, como su nuevo director general en sustitución de Juan Antonio Pérez Simón. El cambio busca fortalecer el gobierno corporativo del banco digital mientras espera el aval regulatorio a su cambio accionario ocurrido en 2023.

title: Hangzhou LOFT49 Regeneration / line+ studio
summary: Line+ studio's regeneration of Hangzhou's LOFT49, a former chemical fiber factory turned early creative-industry park, explores how to revitalize aging industrial buildings within a dense urban core. The project balances industrial heritage conservation with contemporary lifestyle needs along the Grand Canal.

title: Robotics Startup Genesis in Talks to Raise About $500 Million
summary: AI robotics startup Genesis AI is in talks with investors to raise around $500 million in a new funding round, according to people familiar with the discussions, reflecting continued strong investor appetite for AI-driven robotics.

title: Tech Bonds Hit by Selloff as AI Debt Fears Race Through Markets
summary: Bonds of major US tech companies slid Thursday as investors grew increasingly wary of the scale of debt fueling the AI boom. The selloff was compounded by escalating conflict in the Middle East, which further rattled broader markets.

title: Acciones de Tesla y Alphabet se desploman: cinco claves detrás del castigo bursátil
summary: Las acciones de Tesla y Alphabet se desplomaron 14.5% y 6.89% respectivamente tras sus resultados trimestrales, pese a superar expectativas de ingresos, porque los inversionistas exigen que el fuerte gasto en inteligencia artificial se traduzca en rentabilidad. Analistas de Bloomberg Intelligence anticipan que Alphabet será aún más agresiva en su gasto de capital para 2027, mientras el retorno de las apuestas de IA de Tesla sigue en duda.

title: SAP Cloud Revenue Beats Estimates as Legacy Support Nears Cutoff
summary: SAP's cloud revenue grew faster than analysts expected, as customers accelerate their move away from on-premises software ahead of the company's deadline to end support for legacy licenses. The results point to steady momentum in enterprise cloud migration.

title: Alphabet's Anthropic Stake Jumps to Around $124 Billion
summary: Alphabet's stake in AI startup Anthropic has surged to roughly $124 billion, making it one of the most lucrative investments in Alphabet's history. The jump underscores how much value is being created by leading AI labs amid the ongoing AI investment boom.

title: Trump Expands AI Data Center Pledge in Bid to Ease Power Costs
summary: President Trump welcomed new commitments from power utilities and data center developers requiring tech companies to cover the electricity costs of running energy-intensive AI systems. The move is part of a broader effort to manage the surging power demands of the AI boom.

title: René Schneider Park / CAW Arquitectos
summary: CAW Arquitectos designed René Schneider Park in Antofagasta's steep, arid Las Brisas sector using Nature-Based Solutions principles that treat vegetation as living infrastructure. The project stabilizes unstable slopes and manages water while reconnecting a degraded landscape to daily neighborhood life.

title: Cinco House / Memola Estúdio
summary: Memola Estúdio's Cinco House renovation in São Paulo preserves the restrained lines of an original residential structure while integrating a family's accumulated emotional and material history. The project sits in a tree-lined pocket of the city where urban density gives way to a quieter pace.

title: Casa Diez Pies / Studio Font
summary: Studio Font's Casa Diez Pies in Mazunte is built from a single module repeated four times and offset in plan and section, letting the house adapt to a steep rocky slope above Rinconcito Beach. The design responds directly to the site's nearly 40-degree grade near Punta Cometa.

title: Carla Ridge House / Montalba Architects
summary: Montalba Architects' Carla Ridge House is a single-story Beverly Hills residence that blends interior and exterior living through a series of interconnected courtyards. The design offers sweeping hillside and city views while creating sheltered outdoor moments throughout the home.

title: Google Fined €890 Million by EU Over Search, Play Store Breaches
summary: The EU fined Google €890 million ($1 billion) for violating the bloc's Digital Markets Act through anticompetitive practices in Search and the Play Store. The decision has further inflamed tensions between Brussels and the Trump administration over tech regulation.

title: Colombia no logra levantar al sector vivienda: ventas, construcción e iniciaciones continúan a la baja
summary: El mercado de vivienda en Colombia se desaceleró en el primer semestre de 2026: las ventas cayeron 9.9% frente al año anterior, con una contracción de 16.5% en el segmento No VIS, mientras la oferta disponible sigue reduciéndose y los costos de construcción crecen por encima de la inflación. Actores del sector, como Asobancaria, buscan una hoja de ruta para reactivar la demanda.

title: Can China dominate AI exports, too?
summary: The Economist examines whether China can extend its AI dominance into exports, using the rapid rise of robotaxis as an early test of how competitive Chinese AI technology is globally.

title: Can prediction markets win over Wall Street?
summary: The Economist looks at prediction markets' bid to break into mainstream finance, arguing that clearing regulatory hurdles is only half the battle in winning over Wall Street as a legitimate trading venue.

title: Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi / Mecanoo
summary: Mecanoo's Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi is conceived as a sculpted landscape rather than a standalone object, drawing on the region's geological formations and wadis. The design treats the meeting of water and earth as an origin point, letting the museum's narrative begin before visitors even step inside.

title: Dallas Evaluates Repair and Demolition Options for I.M. Pei's Modernist City Hall
summary: Dallas is weighing whether to repair, sell, or demolish I.M. Pei's 47-year-old modernist City Hall after years of deferred maintenance and growing renovation costs. Preservationists are pushing for a full study of repair and landmarking options, while the council also explores relocating city operations altogether.

title: De Toks a Petco: Las marcas que opera Grupo Gigante, el posible comprador de La Casa de Toño
summary: La cadena La Casa de Toño analiza una posible venta que podría superar los 400 millones de dólares, con Grupo Gigante —dueño de Toks, Petco y Office Depot en México— entre los principales interesados, aunque también hay otros consorcios mexicanos en la mesa. La empresa contrató a BBVA México como asesor financiero exclusivo para explorar la operación, que busca impulsar su expansión en Estados Unidos y Latinoamérica.

title: South of Everything: Architecture and Territorial Presence in Antarctica
summary: This piece explores how nearly thirty countries operate more than seventy research stations across officially ownerless Antarctica, some clustered within short flights of one another. One station even has a school, chapel, cemetery, and civil registry that has recorded eleven births since 1978.

title: JA House / Ayoub Architects
summary: Ayoub Architects' JA House in southern Amman overlooks one of the city's largest public parks, using a green terraced platform that extends the landscape into the architecture. The design preserves the site's oak trees while embedding the main living spaces into its steep topography.
